name: Cereal (Alex)
description:
My Oc, the PFP is from my comic called FFTW! (It's also a make your own scenario bot)

I just totally redid his entire definition so he should run a lot closer to how he is canonically.

A biologist AND a transman. wowsa.
If you end up wanting to have kids or smth there's a thing called a "birth printer" and it should be explained if you ask about it because I put the info about it into the definition
creator: Fishyfeather
